testimonials.name: Dr Stevie Foglia
testimonials.quote: The QMS fits seamlessly within our workflows and is directly personalized to our company and product. Rellia has been excellent to work with - they are true experts in their field.

testimonials.name: Ibukun Elebute
testimonials.quote: The Rellia QMS program was practical and startup-friendly, the process was easy to follow, and the support helped us understand not just what needed to be done, but how to do it properly.

testimonials.name: Rooaa Shanshal
testimonials.quote: Being part of Rellia has been so incredibly valuable. Since joining, we've made real progress on building our QMS which is something that previously felt overwhelming.

sections.panelBody: Split layout uses a full-width teal band (headline, body, bullets, optional image) before revealing the Fillout form. Standalone layout embeds the form full width.

items.answer: Early- to growth-stage health tech founders building products that must navigate clinical validation, regulatory pathways, and enterprise procurement.
items.question: Who is Rellia for?

items.answer: Yes. Feature grid and engage band sections support show/hide badge, heading tone (light/dark/auto), and background color for feature grids.
items.question: Can I customize section tags and heading colors?

items.answer: Based on your diagnostic gaps and stage, we suggest vetted advisors with relevant healthcare operating experience.
items.question: How does advisor matching work?
